questionHtml:
A cell of negligible internal resistance is connected to three identical resistors. The current in the cell is 3.0 A.

The resistors are now arranged in series.

What is the new current in the cell?


A.  1.0 A

B.  1.5 A

C.  3.0 A

D.  9.0 A
